product: Genie join relationships and data handling enhancements
tagline: Local join relationships in Genie Space knowledge stores: You can now define join relationships locally within a Genie Space's knowledge store.
what_it_does: Local join relationships in Genie Space knowledge stores: You can now define join relationships locally within a Genie Space's knowledge store. This is useful when authors lack permissions to define primary and foreign keys on upstream tables or when the join relationship has specific requirements, such as one to many or complex joins. Fixed saving issue for example SQL statements: Resolved a bug where example SQL statements were not saving after clicking Save.
why_it_matters: Fixed saving issue for example SQL statements: Resolved a bug where example SQL statements were not saving after clicking Save.

capabilities.title: Fiscal year starts in February
capabilities.desc: Fiscal year starts in February, for example fiscal year 26 or FY26 is February 1, 2026 through January 31, 2027

key_takeaway: Local join relationships in Genie Space knowledge stores: You can now define join relationships locally within a Genie Space's knowledge store.
